General.Name: Shanshan Brand Management Co Ltd
General.Description: Shanshan Brand Management Co., Ltd., an investment holding company, designs, markets, and sells formal and casual business menswear in the People's Republic of China. The company offers its products under the FIRS and SHANSHAN brand names. It is also involved in the sub-licensing of trademark; and distribution of casual and formal business menswear through retail and e-commerce platforms. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Ningbo, the People's Republic of China.
